Arre bhai, main tumhe detail mein process batata hoon. 

Step 1: USB pendrive par Kali Linux ISO download karna hai. 

- Sabse pehle, tum apne laptop par browser open karo.
- Phir, tum Kali Linux official website par visit karo aur Kali Linux ISO download link par click karo.
- Ab, tumhe apne laptop par Kali Linux ISO download karne ke liye USB pendrive select karna hoga.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux ISO ko USB pendrive par download kar liya ho, toh tumhara step 1 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 2: Kali Linux ISO ko USB pendrive mein burn karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum apne laptop par Rufus software install karo.
- Phir, tum Rufus software open karo aur USB pendrive ko select karo.
- Ab, tum Kali Linux ISO ko select karo aur "Start" button par click karo.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux ISO ko USB pendrive par burn kar liya ho, toh tumhara step 2 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 3: Laptop ko restart karna hai aur boot option mein USB pendrive ko select karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum apne laptop ko restart karo.
- Phir, tum apne laptop par boot option ko select karo.
- Ab, tum USB pendrive ko select karo aur "Enter" button par click karo.
- Jab tumne laptop ko restart kar liya aur boot option mein USB pendrive ko select kar liya ho, toh tumhara step 3 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 4: Kali Linux installer open karna hai aur "English" select karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum Kali Linux installer open karo.
- Phir, tum "English" select karo.
- Ab, tum "Install Kali Linux" par click karo.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux installer open kar liya aur "English" select kar liya ho, toh tumhara step 4 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 5: Kali Linux installer ki instructions follow karna hai aur laptop ko restart karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum Kali Linux installer ki instructions follow karo.
- Phir, tum laptop ko restart karo.
- Ab, tum Kali Linux installer ki instructions follow karo aur laptop ko restart karo.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux installer ki instructions follow kar liya aur laptop ko restart kar liya ho, toh tumhara step 5 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 6: Kali Linux OS par hain, ab login credentials enter karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum Kali Linux OS par hain.
- Phir, tum login credentials enter karo.
- Ab, tum Kali Linux OS par login ho gaye hain.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux OS par login kar liya ho, toh tumhara step 6 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 7: Kali Linux terminal open karna hai aur "sudo apt update" aur "sudo apt full-upgrade" commands execute karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum Kali Linux terminal open karo.
- Phir, tum "sudo apt update" aur "sudo apt full-upgrade" commands execute karo.
- Ab, tum Kali Linux terminal par hain aur commands execute kar liye hain.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux terminal open kar liya aur commands execute kar liye hain, toh tumhara step 7 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 8: Kali Linux fully updated ho gaya hai, ab "sudo apt install kali-linux-defaults" command execute karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum Kali Linux terminal par hain.
- Phir, tum "sudo apt install kali-linux-defaults" command execute karo.
- Ab, tum Kali Linux default settings install kar liye hain.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux default settings install kar liye hain, toh tumhara step 8 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 9: Kali Linux default settings install ho gaye hain, ab laptop ko restart karna hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum Kali Linux terminal par hain.
- Phir, tum laptop ko restart karo.
- Ab, tum Kali Linux default settings install kar liye hain aur laptop ko restart kar liya ho.
- Jab tumne Kali Linux default settings install kar liye hain aur laptop ko restart kar liya ho, toh tumhara step 9 complete ho gaya hai.

Step 10: Kali Linux OS par hain, ab aapka laptop Kali Linux se Windows se change ho gaya hai.

- Sabse pehle, tum Kali Linux OS par hain.
- Phir, tum apne laptop ko check karo ki aapka laptop Kali Linux se Windows se change ho gaya hai.
- Ab, tum apne laptop ko check kar liya ho ki aapka laptop Kali Linux se Windows se change ho gaya hai.
- Jab tumne apne laptop ko check kar liya ho ki aapka laptop Kali Linux se Windows se change ho gaya hai, toh tumhara step 10 complete ho gaya hai.
